data.title: W&T Offshore to release Q3 2025 earnings; conference call scheduled; symbol: WTI.
data.description: Houston-based company W&T Offshore, Inc. (NYSE: WTI) has disclosed the schedule for the release of its third quarter 2025 financial results and conference call. The announcement was made on October 23, 2025.

data.title: Tradr launches 9 new leveraged ETFs for industry leaders, offering 200% long exposure.
data.description: Today, Tradr ETFs introduced nine new single stock leveraged ETFs designed for sophisticated investors and professional traders. The funds aim to offer 200% long exposure to a range of industry leaders. Out of the nine ETFs launched, seven provide this exposure on specific stocks.

data.title: TechnipFMC reports Q3 2025 results: Revenue $2.6B, up 4.4% from previous quarter and 12.7% year-over-year, with net income of $309.7M.
data.description: TechnipFMC plc (NYSE: FTI) released its third-quarter 2025 financial results with revenue reaching $2.65 billion, up 4.4% from the previous quarter and 12.7% year-over-year. Net income for the period was $309.7 million, showing growth from the previous quarter. The company provided a detailed breakdown of its financial performance, including a reconciliation of U.S. GAAP to non-GAAP measures in their financial schedules.

data.title: Ketjen and Axens extend collaboration with Eurecat on catalyst tech, Ketjen sells 50% stake in Eurecat to Axens.
data.description: In Houston and Rueil-Malmaison, France, Ketjen Corporation and Axens SA have disclosed modifications to their ownership of and partnership with Eurecat. As per the new agreements, Ketjen is set to expand its collaboration with Eurecat related to cutting-edge catalyst technologies and services like regeneration, rejuvenation, ex-situ sulfiding, and processing of spent catalysts. Moreover, Ketjen has agreed to transfer its 50 percent ownership interest in Eurecat SA to Axens, along with Ketjen's Isomerizati.

data.title: Lindsay Corp. (NYSE: LNN) reports Q4 results for FY 2025 with international irrigation revenues up 23%, North America impacted by lower demand.
data.description: Lindsay Corporation (NYSE: LNN), a prominent global manufacturer and distributor of irrigation and infrastructure equipment and technology, released its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on August 31, 2025. In the fourth quarter, international irrigation revenues surged by 23%, primarily driven by growth in regions such as South America, MENA, and Australia. However, North America irrigation revenues were reduced due to a decrease in replacement demand post lower storm damages.

data.title: Heineken® 0.0 partners with Premier Padel, entering fastest-growing sport. Global Beer Partner with leading padel tour.
data.description: An announcement was made on October 23, 2025, that Heineken ® 0.0 has significantly broadened its global sponsorship reach by entering a groundbreaking global agreement with Premier Padel, the top official professional padel tour globally. This strategic partnership designates Heineken ® 0.0 as the Global Beer Partner for Premier Padel, solidifying its position in the swiftly expanding sport.

data.title: OpenAI reveals AI blueprint to boost Japan's economy, drive innovation, and ensure sustainable growth in multiple sectors.
data.description: OpenAI recently unveiled an extensive AI Economic Blueprint tailored for Japan in an effort to stimulate innovation, competitiveness, and sustainable growth across a myriad of industries. This blueprint serves as a strategic guide to leverage artificial intelligence to the advantage of Japan’s economy.

data.title: Valero Energy's Q3 2025 net income $1.1 billion, $3.53/share, up from $364 million, $1.14/share in Q3 2024. Adjusted net income $1.1 billion, $3.66/share.
data.description: In San Antonio, Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE: VLO) released its financial results for Q3 of 2025, revealing a net income of $1.1 billion, equating to $3.53 per share attributable to Valero stockholders. This marks a significant increase from the Q3 2024 figures of $364 million and $1.14 per share. When excluding specified adjustments, the adjusted net income attributable to Valero stockholders for Q3 2025 was $1.1 billion, amounting to $3.66 per share.

data.title: Hasbro's Third Quarter 2025 financial results released from their headquarters in Pawtucket, Rhode Island.
data.description: Toy manufacturer Hasbro, based in Pawtucket, Rhode Island, recently announced its financial results for the third quarter of 2025. The company reported a revenue of $X million, reflecting an increase of X% compared to the same period last year. The net income for the quarter was $X million. Hasbro's performance in the third quarter was driven by strong sales in its toy and game segments. The company is optimistic about its continued growth and success in the market.
